author: w3Lb
content: Fix landed in commit 9ead6a3 (added Win32_Storage_FileSystem + Win32_System_IO to windows-sys features in ripsed-fs/Cargo.toml, now on windows-sys 0.61). Verified today: installed x86_64-pc-windows-msvc target and ran cargo check --workspace against it — all crates pass. lock.rs imports (Foundation, Storage::FileSystem, System::IO) all covered by the declared feature set.
